name: Healthy Oat Granola
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Quaker Oat Bran hot cereal, -uncooked
1/3 cup Instant nonfat dry milk solids
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine oat bran, oats, dried milk, honey, sunflower seeds, vegetable oil, water, orange peel, and vanilla. Mix well.
3. Spread the mixture evenly in a greased 13 x 9-inch baking pan.
4. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, stirring once after 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. Stir in banana chips and raisins.
6. Allow the granola to cool completely before storing in an airtight container for up to one week.
7. Serve cold or reheat hot with skim milk or as a topping over fruit, low-fat yogurt, or ice cream, if desired.
(Note: Approximately 430 calories per serving.)
